messages.content: Build a pure Decider for an Expedition aggregate in TypeScript. Export initialState, decide, and evolve using discriminated unions for Command, Event, and State. Throw a DomainError when trying to launch an already-launched expedition.

Write a Decider for a BaseCamp aggregate in TypeScript. Constraints: strict types, no any, exhaustive switch with never default, typed DomainError, reject striking a BaseCamp that still has occupants.
Build an event-sourced Decider for a SummitAttempt in TypeScript. Events: SummitAttemptStarted, CheckpointReached, SummitReached, Aborted. Reject starting twice and reject any command after Aborted.
What's the v5 way to express a GearCheck Decider in TypeScript that rejects signing off a check with any failed item? Show a minimal example using decide and evolve.
Explain briefly how a Decider keeps business rules pure, then implement a Sherpa Decider in TypeScript that tracks hiring, assignment, and discharge.

Write an event-sourced Decider for a Provisioning aggregate in TypeScript. Constraints: strict types, no any, use a typed DomainError, reject finalising provisioning when required items are still missing.

Build a projection in TypeScript that folds Acclimatisation events into a denormalised read model showing climber, current altitude reached, and rotation count. Include project, emptyView, and a View type.
What's the idiomatic way to build a RouteRecce projection in TypeScript that only cares about the two event types MarkerPlanted and HazardSpotted, ignoring anything else? Show project and emptyView.
Explain briefly how a projection differs from an aggregate's evolve, then show a TypeScript WeatherWindow projection that produces a queryable summary of open windows and their forecasted quality.

Build a versioned snapshot loader in TypeScript for a BaseCamp aggregate. Declare a CURRENT_VERSION, v1Tov2 and v2Tov3 upgraders, and a loadSnapshot that walks the chain until the stored payload matches the current shape.
What's a clean TypeScript pattern to decide when to write a SummitAttempt Snapshot? Show a shouldSnapshot helper plus a Snapshot type carrying a version and revision.
Write a snapshot reader in TypeScript that loads a GearCheck Snapshot and replays events after its revision. Constraints: local EventStore interface, no any, exhaustive default.

Build an Effect-wrapped optimistic-concurrency writer in TypeScript for a Sherpa stream. Use a local EventStore interface with expectedRevision and convert a store conflict signal into a typed ConcurrencyConflict.
How do I append Provisioning events with optimistic concurrency in TypeScript? Show a local EventStore interface using expectedRevision and a write helper that raises ConcurrencyConflict on mismatch.
Build an Effect-wrapped Expedition CommandHandler in TypeScript that loads the stream, folds via evolve, calls decide, and appends events with expectedRevision. Use a local EventStore interface.
What's the v5 way to wire a BaseCamp CommandHandler in TypeScript that reads, folds, decides, and appends? Show the full path with a local EventStore interface.

Write a TypeScript GearCheck CommandHandler. Constraints: a local EventStore interface, expectedRevision typed as bigint | "no_stream" | "any", the handler must not contain any business logic — only orchestration.

Build a TypeScript subscription runner that feeds Sherpa events into a read model and persists a checkpoint AFTER each applied event. Declare a CheckpointStore interface and a runSubscription function.
How would I wrap a Provisioning projection subscription in Effect, reading from a checkpoint and writing the new checkpoint after each event? Show the runner.
Explain briefly why a subscription must write the checkpoint AFTER applying the projection, then implement an Acclimatisation runSubscription in TypeScript that honours that ordering.
Build a generic aggregateStream helper in TypeScript that folds an AsyncIterable of Expedition events into state using a typed evolve. Include a sample call that reconstructs an Expedition.
How do I write an Effect-wrapped aggregateStream helper for a BaseCamp state in TypeScript? Show the generic shape and a concrete BaseCamp evolve.
Explain briefly why aggregateStream is generic over state and event, then show a typed TypeScript version applied to a GearCheck.
Build an upcaster in TypeScript for Sherpa events. Raw payloads with version 1 use a legacy field "personName"; the current shape uses "name". Migrate at read time with a typed upcast function.
Write a TypeScript upcaster for Provisioning events. Constraints: strict types, switch on { type, version }, throw UnknownEventError on unknown combinations, default raw branch uses never.
Build a TypeScript rebuild function that wipes the Acclimatisation read store and replays from revision 0 in batches. Accept from, batchSize, project, and persist callbacks.

Write a minimal CQRS split in TypeScript for Expedition. Constraints: handleCommand uses decide + appendToStream, queryView reads from a separate store, the two sides share the event union but NOT the state type.
Explain briefly the CQRS boundary in event sourcing, then show a TypeScript BaseCamp implementation with handleCommand on the write side and queryView on the read side.

Build a stateless saga in TypeScript that reacts to SummitAttempt events: when SummitReached, issue a RequestExtraction command; when Aborted, issue RequestEvacuation. Use a pure react function and return null for anything else.
How would I write a process manager in TypeScript that reacts to GearCheckSignedOff by issuing a ReleaseToExpedition command? Show a react function with a null for irrelevant events.
Explain briefly why integration events differ from domain events, then show a TypeScript Sherpa translator that returns null for internal-only domain events.
Build a TypeScript helper that composes a BaseCamp Decider with an audit log: every event produced by decide is wrapped into a domain-log entry. Use the Decider shape and return a typed tuple.
